pin1_marker: none visible — orientation by pad position
note: F33 module has built-in 2W PA (+33 dBm at 433 MHz) and industrial-grade TCXO 0.5ppm. Completely different pinout from bare LoRa2021. 9 pins per side, left side pins 1-9 top-to-bottom, right side pins 10-18 top-to-bottom. Module package 39x21mm per LCSC. Power: 3.0-5.5V, use 5V for full 2W output.

top_view_left_side_top_to_bottom.note: Internal LDO enable. Drive high or float for operation. Pull LOW for sleep mode. 0-3.3V logic

key_differences_from_bare_lora2021.pinout: Completely different. F33: VCC, 7xGND, CE, ANT, ANT-2G4, GND, SCK, NSS, BUSY, MOSI, MISO, RESET, IRQ. Bare LoRa2021: VCC, GND, MISO, MOSI, SCK, NSS, BUSY, GND, ANT, 2.4G, GND, GND, VTCXO, RST, DIO9, DIO8, DIO7, GND
key_differences_from_bare_lora2021.new_pins: CE (Pin 5) — LDO enable/sleep control. No equivalent on bare LoRa2021
key_differences_from_bare_lora2021.removed_pins: VTCXO (was Pin 13 on bare), DIO7 (was Pin 17), DIO8 (was Pin 16), DIO9 (was Pin 15, replaced by IRQ on Pin 18)
key_differences_from_bare_lora2021.power: 3.0-5.5V (5V for full 2W) vs 1.8-3.6V (3.3V) on bare LoRa2021
key_differences_from_bare_lora2021.built_in_pa: F33 has built-in 2W PA — no SKY66112 FEM needed, no TX_EN GPIO needed
key_differences_from_bare_lora2021.tcxo: F33 has industrial-grade TCXO 0.5ppm (internal). Bare LoRa2021 had VTCXO pin

layout_top_view_ascii:
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
   VCC  1 │                                      │ 10 ANT-2G4
   GND  2 │                                      │ 11 GND
   GND  3 │                                      │ 12 SCK
   GND  4 │       LoRa2021F33-2G4                 │ 13 NSS
    CE  5 │       39x21mm                        │ 14 BUSY
   GND  6 │       Castellated                    │ 15 MOSI
   GND  7 │       18-pin                         │ 16 MISO
   GND  8 │                                      │ 17 RESET
   ANT  9 │                                      │ 18 IRQ
          └──────────────────────────────────────┘
          (Left: pins 1-9 top to bottom)  (Right: pins 10-18 top to bottom)
